name: PaymentIntent
description: The PaymentIntent object represents a payment lifecycle from creation through confirmation and capture.

id.description: Unique identifier for the object (prefix: pi_)

amount.description: Amount intended to be collected in the smallest currency unit (cents)

amount_capturable.description: Amount that can be captured from the PaymentIntent

customer.description: ID of the Customer this PaymentIntent belongs to

payment_method.description: ID of the PaymentMethod attached to this PaymentIntent

capture_method.description: Controls when the funds will be captured

description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object. Often useful for displaying to users.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs for storing additional information

created.description: Time at which the object was created (Unix timestamp)

livemode.description: Has the value true if the object exists in live mode

client_secret.description: The client secret for use in client-side confirmation
